title: deriveStatus false-complete is SYSTEMIC repo-wide tooling defect: 363 folders mislabeled complete while incomplete; 213 ALREADY live-corrupted on-disk in graph/memory index today
claim: Replicated deriveStatus full decision tree over whole repo. Trigger set (impl-summary present AND no checklist) = 768 folders. Only 2 carry a valid frontmatter enum status anywhere -> 766 fall through to buggy line 1216 and receive status:complete. Of those, 363 are ACTUALLY INCOMPLETE (completion_pct<100 OR open [ ] tasks in tasks.md) = FALSE complete (263 scaffold impl-summary + 100 authored-but-incomplete). 213 of those 363 ALREADY show derived.status:'complete' in their on-disk graph-metadata.json TODAY = live corruption in memory_search/packet-graph/resume-ladders/status-rollups, not latent. Phase 009 is in the victim set (confirmed). Spans anobel.com, design, ai-systems, deep-loops tracks. deriveStatus (graph-metadata-parser.ts:1215-1218) declares complete on file-presence alone with NO consultation of completion_pct/open-tasks/scaffold-markers.
sampleSizeAndCriteria: population=2047 folders with implementation-summary.md under .opencode/specs+specs; trigger set=768 (no checklist.md sibling); frontmatter-status-valid=normalizeDerivedStatus on first status: field in YAML of any of [impl-summary,checklist,tasks,plan,spec] using closed enum (planned,draft,placeholder,in_progress,blocked,deferred,complete,unknown)+synonyms(done,completed,active); actually-incomplete=completion_pct<100 OR ^[-*] [ ] open-task in tasks.md; already-live-corrupted=on-disk graph-metadata.json parses with derived.status==='complete'
evidenceRefs: graph-metadata-parser.ts:1178-1195 (ranked-frontmatter branch; only 2/768 satisfy -> 766 reach bug)
graph-metadata-schema.ts:19-28 (closed enum; bracketed placeholder normalizes null)

sweep: trigger=768, frontmatter-null=766, actually-incomplete=363 (263 scaffold+100 authored), on-disk-of-363={complete:213,in_progress:60,planned:52,draft:17,deferred:1,blocked:1,no-graph-metadata-file:19}
phase 009 in victim set; iteration-3.md (impl-summary scaffold); graph-metadata.json:3 (legacy Status: planned)
counterevidenceSought: (1) is 'actually incomplete' reliable or are the 213 stale-pct? cannot fully exclude without per-folder audit, BUT phase 009 (pct0, handover says not-started, all scaffolds) is definitively false -> heuristic genuinely errs; 213 is upper bound, realized count in [definitive-false-positives .. 213], lower bound (~150 scaffold pct0/open>0) already systemic. (2) does my frontmatter extraction match collectPacketDocs? corroborated independently: the 213 already show complete on-disk, ONLY reachable via line 1216 (their frontmatter has no valid status) -> production deriveStatus demonstrably reaches the buggy branch; on-disk state is a natural experiment confirming my replicated tree matches the real function. (3) are the 19 'UNPARSEABLE' a second D1 spike? NO -> re-checked D1 sweep still 1/2425 unparseable (phase 009 only); the 19 are ENOENT/missing graph-metadata.json (latent victims, distinct from D1 parseability).
alternativeExplanation: for keeping P1/isolated: 'only phase 009' REFUTED (363 victims, 4+ tracks); 'latent only' REFUTED (213 already live on-disk); 'scaffold-with-impl-summary=structurally complete by design' untenable -> makes status useless for authored-vs-scaffold AND contradicts completion_pct:0/open-tasks; on-disk complete for unambiguously-not-started phase 009 is a correctness violation by any reading
scope: systemic tooling-level correctness defect with realized production impact (213 live false-complete in graph/memory index); cross-cutting consumers; sibling to D1-P2-001
downgradeTrigger: downgrade P1 if deriveStatus patched to consult completion_pct/open-tasks before line 1216 (file-presence alone can never yield complete for incomplete phase) OR per-folder authoring audit shows vast majority of 213 are actually-complete-with-stale-pct
upgradeTrigger: none (already P0); 213-live figure could rise if more backfills run pre-patch

claim: D4-P1-001 is a phase-009-isolated instance (iteration 4 classification, P1)
evidence: repo-wide deriveStatus replication: 363 actually-incomplete folders would be false-complete; 213 already on-disk complete
only 2/768 trigger folders carry valid frontmatter status -> 766 reach buggy line 1216
on-disk natural experiment: 213 folders already corrupted corroborates production reaches the bug
bearing: iteration 4's own upgradeTrigger is met; P1->P0

evidence: re-derived repo-wide JSON.parse sweep: total 2425, unparseable 1 (phase 009's own file)
the 19 'no-graph-metadata.json' folders in D4 sweep are ENOENT/missing, NOT unparseable -> distinct from D1
git reflog -30: only same 032 commits + reset-to-HEAD; no reset/stash/checkout touching phase 009
git stash list: still exactly 6 entries (matches D2-P2-001 corrected count)
repo-wide lock/pid grep for 009-speckit-command-goal-prompt-offer excl review/: still NONE

reasoning: deriveStatus false-complete is systemic: 363 victims (4+ tracks), 213 already live on-disk. Not a phase-009 footnote. Sibling to D1-P2-001. D1 1/2425 and D2 UNVERIFIABLE both re-confirmed stable ~35min later. stop_policy=max-iterations -> iteration 6 broadens to consumer-blast-radius of the 213 live-corrupted rows + patch-shape feasibility.

note: D4-P1-001 escalated to P0 (D4-P0-001) on data meeting its own upgradeTrigger. The escalation is corroborated independently by the 213 already-corrupted on-disk files (natural experiment), not solely by my replicated decision tree. Adversarial caveats recorded: 213 is an upper bound (stale-pct fraction non-excludable without per-folder audit); the 19 'UNPARSEABLE' in the probe are ENOENT/missing, not D1-class parse failures. Recommended iter-6: quantify whether any consumer of derived.status (memory_search/resume-ladders/status-rollups) changes behavior on complete vs planned -> would give the P0 a concrete user-facing failure mode.
